name: kbd
title: Kbd
description: Render terminal-styled keycap glyphs for single keys, chords, and key sequences. The atom that turns 'ctrl+k' into a readable ⌃ K in your hint rows and palettes.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Stateless rendering primitive. Call kbd.Render("Ctrl") or kbd.Chord("Ctrl", "K") from inside your existing View() and place the result wherever a keycap belongs. The atom reads theme.Default automatically; pass a Style to RenderStyled when you need to override a single color. Compose into hint rows with kbd.Sequence(kbd.Chord("g"), kbd.Chord("g")) for keystroke series.
